zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwilym ap Gwrwared of Cemais於1212年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾時，他的父親Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes47歲，母親Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan47歲。他於1235年與Joan Stackpole結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1262年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwilym ap Gwrwared of Cemais于1212年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾时，他的父亲Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes47岁，母亲Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan47岁。他于1235年与Joan Stackpole结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1262年在他的家乡享年50岁。

meanings: equivalent of William , in use since the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Gwilim
meanings: equivalent of William , in use since the Middle Ages.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwilym ap Gwrwared of Cemais was born in 1212, in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes, was 47 and his mother, Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan, was 47. He married Joan Stackpole in 1235. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1262, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwilym ap Gwrwared of Cemais est né en 1212, à Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Joan Stackpole en 1235. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1262, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwilym ap Gwrwared of Cemais 1212 in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes 47 und seine Mutter Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan 47. Er hat 1235 Joan Stackpole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1262 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwilym ap Gwrwared of Cemais è nato il nel 1212 nel Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Joan Stackpole nel 1235. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1262, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwilym ap Gwrwared of Cemaisが1212年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaesは47歳，母Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychanは47歳であった。1235年にJoan Stackpoleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1262年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwilym ap Gwrwared of Cemais(이)가 1212년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1235년 Joan Stackpole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1262년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwilym ap Gwrwared of Cemais nasceu em 1212, em Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Stackpole em 1235. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1262, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwilym ap Gwrwared of Cemais родился в 1212 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Stackpole в 1235 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1262 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwilym ap Gwrwared of Cemais nació en 1212, en Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Joan Stackpole en 1235. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1262, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
